---
title: "World Development Indicators"
page-layout: article
---

# World Development Indicators

**Provider:** World Bank

## Description

World Bank database of global development indicators compiled from official country, regional, and international sources. Supports development economics and comparative policy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Government & International Statistics, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Government & International Statistics, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1387)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
